name: Boss is mad I filed back injury claim, can they fire me?
description: Retaliation illegal—document and report to commission if threatened[1].

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed back injury claim, can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Retaliation illegal—document and report to commission if threatened[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation is illegal; protected under workers comp laws.** Document threats[1]. **Key factors:** Timing of discipline post-claim, performance records. **Practical guidance:** Report retaliation to Labor Commission, keep journal, don't quit. Sue if terminated. **Utah/Idaho prohibit this[1].**
